articles.title: Apple's Big MacBook Price Hikes Just Made It Clear: The RAM Tax Is Here to Stay
articles.description:
Apple's new, higher Mac prices aren't the return of the fabled "Apple tax." They show how even the biggest players aren't immune to today's global memory shortage.
